name: Feitian
tagline: China's EVA suit — derived from the Orlan, first flown on Shenzhou 7 in 2008
description: Chinese rear-entry EVA suit derived from the Soviet Orlan design. First flown on Shenzhou 7 in 2008 when Zhai Zhigang became the first Chinese taikonaut to spacewalk. Now in operational use on the Tiangong space station's Wentian airlock. The name means "flying in heaven" — also the name of the Apsara dancers in Chinese mythology.
best_known_for: China's EVA suit — used by Zhai Zhigang on the country's first spacewalk during Shenzhou 7
